text: What an annunciation this is — a whole new consciousness has arrived, trailing its oceanic origin, already busy reorganizing your understanding of what matters. You will discover that love, which you thought you knew, has been holding back this whole time, some deeper reserve it never revealed until now. The tiredness will be real, and the wonder will be realer. You are no longer the protagonist of a single story; you have become, somehow, the ground on which another story begins. Hold this creature carefully. It already knows more about being new than either of us will ever remember. Congratulations, truly.
